rawFiles.name: logistics-cluster-supply-routes-snapshot-middle-east-2026-05-25.html
rawFiles.notes: Fetched for checksum review only; raw HTML is not committed.

transforms: Review only the point-location observations in the corridors into Syria section.
Use the source publication/revision date, 2026-05-25, as both statusAsOf and sourceReferences[].sourceRecordDate.
Attach route-table status only where the named border crossing point or port maps to an existing canonical location ID.
Preserve concise notes that identify the source context as a corridor or sea-route observation.
Hold route geometry, indicative lead times, and ambiguous alternate border crossing points for a future route dataset review.
reviewNotes: Imported 5 dated status snapshot records from the 25 May 2026 regional supply-route snapshot: Nasib/Jaber, Cilvegozu-Bab alHawa, Al Masnaa/Jdidet, Latakia Port, and Tartous Port. Held Gulf/KSA/Jordan/Syria duplicated route rows, the Iraq-Syria Al Waleed/Al Tanf or Rabiaa/Al-Yaroubiyah alternate route row, Red Sea multimodal constraints, Lebanon onward corridors, route geometry, and lead-time values because they require a separate route/corridor model or are not point-location status evidence. No location operationalStatus values were changed.
